---
title: "Resources"
---

This page collects supplementary resources for **{{< var course.number >}}: {{< var course.title >}}**. Whether you are setting up R for the first time, transitioning from Stata, or looking for writing guidelines, you will find what you need here.

## {{< fa rocket >}} Getting started

These resources help you set up your computing environment and get comfortable with R.

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| {{< fa download >}} [R & RStudio Setup Guide](r-setup.qmd) | Install R, RStudio, and essential packages — or use the cloud alternative |
| {{< fa arrows-rotate >}} [Stata-to-R Cheat Sheet](stata-to-r.qmd) | Side-by-side command translations for students transitioning from Stata |

## {{< fa book >}} Reference

These resources support your work throughout the course.

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| {{< fa database >}} [Datasets (regdatasets)](datasets.qmd) | Overview of the {{< var materials.datasets >}} curated datasets used in this course |
| {{< fa pen-ruler >}} [Writing & Style Guide](style-guide.qmd) | Formatting conventions and APA-style reporting guidelines for project reports |
| {{< fa circle-question >}} [Frequently Asked Questions](faq.qmd) | Answers to common questions about the course, software, and assignments |

## {{< fa book-open >}} Course materials

All course materials are open-access and freely available online.

| Material | What it is |
|----------|------------|
| {{< fa book-open >}} [Lecture Notes]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}){target="_blank"} | The narrative textbook — {{< var materials.chapters >}} chapters |
| {{< fa laptop-code >}} [Lab Manual]({{< var books.r_lab_book >}}){target="_blank"} | Hands-on R tutorials — {{< var materials.labs >}} labs |
| {{< fa circle-question >}} [Practice Quizzes]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}){target="_blank"} | Interactive, ungraded self-checks — {{< var materials.quizzes >}} quizzes |
| {{< fa clipboard-list >}} [Project Guide]({{< var books.project_guide >}}){target="_blank"} | Guidelines + worked examples for the {{< var materials.projects >}} projects |
| {{< fa database >}} [regdatasets Package]({{< var books.regdatasets >}}){target="_blank"} | {{< var materials.datasets >}} curated educational datasets |
